Dialog.name: MSG_900_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Ah, my soeur. How have you been? I'm finally back home, so how about some tea?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_901_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Mon frère! You left three months ago! Where have you been, you bum?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_902_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Oh, Mont-Saint-Michel, Versailles... I've built quite the reputation as a romantic.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}That was a fun movie! And I[n]picked up a little French, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}How nostalgic! I haven't seen my home country in quite some time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Bebe[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
